fillColor FFFFFF
drawBackground
fillColor 000000

# ==== Box: U+F49F
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 406 0 /uniF49F
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+F49F"
move 1400
